title: Detecting Strongly Connected Components: Fix the Backtracking

statement.markdown: Given a directed graph (represented as an adjacency list), find all strongly connected components (SCCs) using the Kosaraju's algorithm. The Kosaraju's algorithm involves two main steps: 1) finding the reverse graph of the original graph, 2) performing DFS on the original graph and the reverse graph.
statement.inputFormat: Input will be in the form of an adjacency list represented as a vector of vectors, where each inner vector represents a list of neighboring nodes. Example: [[1, 2], [0, 3], [0, 3], [1, 2]]
statement.outputFormat: Output should be one or more SCCs, represented as lists of node indices. Example: [[2, 3], [0, 1]]
statement.notes: Nodes are 0-indexed and represent the vertices of the graph. The nodes are not necessarily connected to each other.

constraints.description: Number of nodes in the graph

hints.text: First, find the reverse graph of the original graph.

editorial.title: Kosaraju's Algorithm
editorial.intuition: Kosaraju's algorithm involves finding the reverse of the graph and then performing DFS on both graphs.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach: Create a new graph with edges as (j, i) for each (i, j) in the original graph and find SCCs in this new graph.
editorial.betterSolution: Use DFS to find the order in which nodes are visited in the original graph.
editorial.optimalSolution: Perform DFS on the original graph to find the order of nodes, then perform DFS on the reverse graph using this order.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Kosaraju's algorithm is correct because the strongly connected component is a set of vertices that have a cycle.
commonMistakes: Failing to correctly reverse the graph
Using an incorrect order for DFS

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution {public: vector<vector<int>> stronglyConnectedComponents(int numNodes, vector<vector<int>>& adjacencyList) { vector<int> reverseGraph[numNodes]; for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) reverseGraph[i].clear(); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) for (int neighbor : adjacencyList[i]) reverseGraph[neighbor].push_back(i); vector<int> order = findReversePostOrder(numNodes, reverseGraph); vector<vector<int>> sccs; for (int node : order) sccs.push_back(performDfs(numNodes, adjacencyList, node)); return sccs; } private: vector<int> findReversePostOrder(int numNodes, vector<vector<int>>& adjacencyList) { vector<int> reverseGraph[numNodes]; for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) reverseGraph[i].clear(); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) for (int neighbor : adjacencyList[i]) reverseGraph[neighbor].push_back(i); vector<int> order; for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) if (reverseGraph[i].empty()) order.push_back(i); int current = 0; stack<int> stack; for (int node : order) if (current == 0) { stack.push(node); current++; } else { stack.pop(); int neighbor = stack.top(); for (int nextNeighbor : reverseGraph[neighbor]) stack.push(nextNeighbor); stack.pop(); order.push_back(neighbor); current--; } return order; } vector<vector<int>> performDfs(int numNodes, vector<vector<int>>& adjacencyList, int startNode) { stack<int> stack; stack.push(startNode); vector<bool> visited(numNodes); while (!stack.empty()) { int currentNode = stack.top(); stack.pop(); visited[currentNode] = true; for (int neighbor : adjacencyList[currentNode]) if (!visited[neighbor]) stack.push(neighbor); } return {{startNode}}; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution {public List<List<Integer>> stronglyConnectedComponents(int numNodes, List<List<Integer>> adjacencyList) { List<List<Integer>> reverseGraph = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) reverseGraph.add(new ArrayList<>()); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) for (int neighbor : adjacencyList.get(i)) reverseGraph.get(neighbor).add(i); List<Integer> order = findReversePostOrder(numNodes, adjacencyList); List<List<Integer>> sccs = new ArrayList<>(); for (int node : order) sccs.add(performDfs(numNodes, adjacencyList, node)); return sccs; } private List<Integer> findReversePostOrder(int numNodes, List<List<Integer>> adjacencyList) { List<List<Integer>> reverseGraph = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) reverseGraph.add(new ArrayList<>()); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) for (int neighbor : adjacencyList.get(i)) reverseGraph.get(neighbor).add(i); List<Integer> order = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) if (reverseGraph.get(i).isEmpty()) order.add(i); int current = 0; Stack<Integer> stack = new Stack<>(); for (int node : order) if (current == 0) { stack.push(node); current++; } else { stack.pop(); int neighbor = stack.peek(); for (int nextNeighbor : reverseGraph.get(neighbor)) stack.push(nextNeighbor); stack.pop(); order.add(neighbor); current--; } return order; } List<List<Integer>> performDfs(int numNodes, List<List<Integer>> adjacencyList, int startNode) { Stack<Integer> stack = new Stack<>(); stack.push(startNode); boolean[] visited = new boolean[numNodes]; while (!stack.empty()) { int currentNode = stack.peek(); stack.pop(); visited[currentNode] = true; for (int neighbor : adjacencyList.get(currentNode)) if (!visited[neighbor]) stack.push(neighbor); } return Collections.singletonList(Collections.singletonList(startNode)); } };
buggyStarterCode.python:
class Solution: def stronglyConnectedComponents(self, numNodes: int, adjacencyList: List[List[int]]) -> List[List[int]]: reverseGraph = [[] for _ in range(numNodes)] for i in range(numNodes): for neighbor in adjacencyList[i]: reverseGraph[neighbor].append(i) order = self.findReversePostOrder(numNodes, adjacencyList) sccs = [] for node in order: sccs.append(self.performDfs(numNodes, adjacencyList, node)) return sccs
def findReversePostOrder(self, numNodes: int, adjacencyList: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]: reverseGraph = [[] for _ in range(numNodes)] for i in range(numNodes): for neighbor in adjacencyList[i]: reverseGraph[neighbor].append(i) order = [] for i in range(numNodes): if not reverseGraph[i]: order.append(i) current = 0 stack = [] for node in order: if current == 0: stack.append(node) current += 1 else: stack.pop() neighbor = stack[-1] for nextNeighbor in reverseGraph[neighbor]: stack.append(nextNeighbor) stack.pop() order.append(neighbor) current -= 1 return order
def performDfs(self, numNodes: int, adjacencyList: List[List[int]], startNode: int) -> List[int]: stack = [startNode] visited = [False] * numNodes while stack: currentNode = stack[-1] stack.pop() visited[currentNode] = True for neighbor in adjacencyList[currentNode]: if not visited[neighbor]: stack.append(neighbor) return [startNode]
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function stronglyConnectedComponents(numNodes, adjacencyList) { let reverseGraph = Array(numNodes).fill().map(() => []); for (let i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) for (let neighbor of adjacencyList[i]) reverseGraph[neighbor].push(i); let order = findReversePostOrder(numNodes, adjacencyList); let sccs = []; for (let node of order) sccs.push(performDfs(numNodes, adjacencyList, node)); return sccs; } function findReversePostOrder(numNodes, adjacencyList) { let reverseGraph = Array(numNodes).fill().map(() => []); for (let i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) for (let neighbor of adjacencyList[i]) reverseGraph[neighbor].push(i); let order = []; for (let i = 0; i < numNodes; i++) if (reverseGraph[i].length === 0) order.push(i); let current = 0; let stack = []; for (let node of order) if (current === 0) { stack.push(node); current++; } else { stack.pop(); let neighbor = stack[stack.length - 1]; for (let nextNeighbor of reverseGraph[neighbor]) stack.push(nextNeighbor); stack.pop(); order.push(neighbor); current--; } return order; } function performDfs(numNodes, adjacencyList, startNode) { let stack = [startNode]; let visited = Array(numNodes).fill(false); while (stack.length) { let currentNode = stack[stack.length - 1]; stack.pop(); visited[currentNode] = true; for (let neighbor of adjacencyList[currentNode]) if (!visited[neighbor]) stack.push(neighbor); } return [startNode]; }

functionSignature.python: List[List[int]] stronglyConnectedComponents(self, numNodes: int, adjacencyList: List[List[int]]) -> List[List[int]]
